summary: The Kill-Shot Strength Rating Key asserted "3 decisive, 2 major, 2 supportive" without any per-test badge for the reader to verify. Fix batched with ISS-941 in EXP-159: patches PATCH-1 through PATCH-7 add inline-styled ks-rating-{decisive,major,supportive} badges to each test header, and PATCH-8 updates the Current ratings sentence to explicitly list which tests fall in which tier (3 decisive: Tests 3, 6, 7; 2 major: Tests 1, 5; 2 supportive: Tests 2, 4). Rationale for each rating is spelled out in EXP-159 under strength_rating_assignments. After apply, the aggregate claim is verifiable by eye from the badges. Recommend close once patched.
